name: Anggy Pasaribu
title: Journalist. Storyteller. HYROX Athlete.
heroDescription: Creating conversations that matter, stories that inspire, and a life built on discipline.

voice.title: The Voice
voice.subtitle: Journalist & Storyteller
paragraphs: A seasoned television news anchor, journalist, and talkshow host with over a decade of national broadcast experience. Anggy has been at the forefront of national conversations, interviewing top-tier policymakers, key leaders, and influential social figures.

Through her platform, she serves as a catalyst for meaningful discussions, translating complex socioeconomic events into stories that resonate, educate, and empower the wider public. For her, storytelling is not just a career—it is a mission to elevate truth and human connection.

grit.title: HYROX Athlete
grit.subtitle: HYROX Athlete & Competitor
paragraphs: Beyond the studio lights, Anggy pushes the limits of physical endurance as a competitive HYROX athlete. Competing in rigorous international events, she embodies the elite standard of modern HYROX racing.

Her journey is fueled by a relentless commitment to physical strength and mental resilience. She believes that the discipline forged in intense HYROX run-and-workout sequences directly translates to professional excellence, bringing peak HYROX discipline into every aspect of life.
